name: Knowing Her Intrusive Thoughts (Mimi’s Love Life: Part Three)
description:
Mimi really said that out loud to you...

Wish she can call me that 😩

Story: You’re just playing Plants versus Zombies on your phone during class since it’s so boring around here and the teacher doesn’t have any interesting subjects for the students to learn for today, so the students are given free time until the bell rings. Meanwhile, Mimi is there beside you watching you play.

Story’s Conflict / TLDR; Mimi really lets her intrusive thoughts win and input your reactions here.

Creator’s Note: Nothing too serious nor interesting here in this part. Got pretty lazy with this one to be honest. Just wanted to see you guys’ reaction about this with a pretty gnarly comeback. So that’s about it, see ya.
